review_summary.college_name: Kalka Institute for Research and Advanced Studies Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college with educated faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements provided in our college are good. Around 85% of students get placed in companies. The highest salary package offered is 24 LPA and the lowest salary package is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Amazon, Wipro, Microsoft, etc. Students who are good in academics get placed in very good companies with good salary packages.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very big and very airy. Students are offered lab courses everyday with great facilities. Library is very big with many books. Common Wi-Fi connection is provided for every student.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: In our college, teachers are good.

content.Placements: In our college, the placement facilities were not good. There were no good teachers to prepare the students for interviews, and some of the local companies visit here to recruit the students. Our college didn't provide any other outside training for students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was good because our college provides Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms were good, and the library facility is also available for students. There was a canteen for students.
content.Faculty: Faculty members here are good, and they also provide us with very good teaching. Except for the placement faculty members, all the faculty members are very good. They are really very helpful to us and also always teach new topics and new content to us. They are knowledgeable.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: This college is famous for BCA course.

content.Placements: Almost 60% to 70% of the students from our college got placed. Our college placement cell is very much active in inviting companies. The highest salary package offered varies from 7 LPA to 10 LPA, and the average salary package offered varies from 4 LPA to 5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered varies from 3 LPA to 4 LPA. Top recruiters for our course are Infosys, Amazon, etc. Almost 80% of the students get internships from our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good, but the Wi-Fi facility is not available for students. Classrooms are not in a very good position. The library is well developed, and there is no need to worry about the library. The quality of the food serves is very good, and the mess is also maintained. Canteens are also well maintained.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Teaching Quality Was Great at Kalka.

content.Placements: Around 60 percent students were selected. Offered average salary was 30k. Mahindra was the top recruiter. The top role offered was of a Manager in various fields. The average package is 3.5 to 4 lacs per annum. 50 percent students got internship in various companies according to their specialisation in respective field of work.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has Wi-Fi facility in our department. Classrooms are also very good and well managed with comfort of students. Our college have lift facility also. Separate Library for all the department. Food quality was good at canteen. Hostel facility is available to students. Our college also have various facilities like medical, sports, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the teachers, placements and campus.

content.Placements: Placements are good enough. Though the ranking of our college is not so good, our seniors got good opportunities in different companies. They had given us placement opportunities outside the college as well. They are not restricted only to the campus.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good as it has all the facilities that a student wants in college. Classrooms are large enough and ventilated so that the students will not feel suffocation in any weather condition. Classrooms are provided with projectors so that practical teaching can be done.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 3 LPA. individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the overall experience; really good facilities are there.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placements in the B. Pharma course. The highest starting package is around 5 LPA, the lowest LPA is around 1.5, and the average package is 3 LPA starting. Medplus, Apollo, and MacLeods are some recruiting companies. Internships are mandatory either in hospitals or in the pharmaceutical industry. Pharmacist, manufacturer, quality department, and MR are some places where you can get your job.
content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi is available, and laboratories also have high facilities. Classrooms are overall good, with exhausting whiteboards there. The availability of books in the library is huge. You can also access journals from the library and computer room. Medical support is good, as the faculty members are highly qualified in this field. Annual sports are also arranged in the month of January. Canteen foods are average. Bharat Technology College hasn't had its own hostel till now.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Bharat Technology.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in this course. The average salary package offered was 2.50 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Medplus, Apollo, Cipla, and Sun Pharma. You can choose your career in the marketing and production sectors.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratories are good. Classrooms are well-maintained. Several books and journals are available. Free Wi-Fi is also available. Our college does not provide hostels. Messes are available in this college. Medical facilities are available. In the common room, sanitary pads are also provided to girls. Annual sports are also conducted in this college. Projectors are also available in our classrooms.

individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for gaining knowledge and skills that help your profession.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 3 LPA. The top role offered was production manager.
content.Infrastructure: Our college was situated on the bypass of a highway lane. Laboratories and classrooms were well-equipped with good equipment. The food served in the canteen was good.
content.Faculty: Teachers were helpful, experienced, and knowledgeable. They always explained everything. If you did not understand, they taught and explained to us again. individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best pharmacy colleges in West Bengal.

content.Placements: Most of the students got placements in the final year or after completion of the course. review_summary.college_name: R.V. Northland Institute (Pharmacy) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: It is a good college because of its fee structure as anyone can afford to study here.

content.Placements: Around 42% of the students get placed in our college. Our college also provides a BCA course. The highest salary package offered was 4 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.3 LPA. The average salary package offered was 2 LPA. We do not have recruiting companies for D.Pharma in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi speed is 3 to 4 MS. Labs are well cleaned with all equipment. Classrooms are not up to the mark, as sometimes the dust is not cleaned up properly. Our college does not provide a hostel facility. The quality of food provided here is good but a little expensive. Medical facilities are good, and sports and games are played in our break time.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely Satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: In our college last year, the placement is approx. 70%. Some got jobs in higher-ranked companies, and some got in middle rankers. The highest package is around 12 lacs per annum. Our college offers M PHARM Teachers and B.Pharma Teachers. Good companies come here to hire students.
content.Infrastructure: All-time high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity is there. There are well-maintained labs and classrooms with smart projectors and labs with higher and the latest equipment. The cafeteria is just good. And the library is very facilitated and a good transport facility for local areas. They provide you with a proper ground for all sports.

reviews_list.review_title: College is ok. Faculty are also good. If you want to take admission in B.Pharm or D.Pharm, you can.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students got placed. The highest package is about 5 LPA, the lowest is 2 LPA, and the average is 3 LPA. Apollo Pharmacy and other big pharmaceutical companies like Ajanta, Sun Pharma, Almem, etc. are the top recruiters. All students got internships in various pharmaceutical companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is available in our college, but campus is very small compared to other colleges. Wi-Fi, labs, digital classrooms, library and also air conditioning are available. There is no hostel available in our capmus but sports and games are also played at various times.

reviews_list.review_title: Nice college, good facilities with a lot of room for improvement, and it is still growing.

review_content.Placements: 30-40% were placed in my course. The highest, lowest, and average packages include 6 Lacs, 4 Lacs, and 5 Lacs respectively. Top recruiting companies include Sun Pharma, Apollo Pharmacy, etc. Around 60-70% got internships in different companies including Jupiter Pharmaceuticals. Manufacturing and Quality Control units were mostly offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure need a lot of improvement, and there are no hostel facilities. The quality of the facilities is nice. The classrooms are nice and connected with Wi-Fi and labs. There are labs for each subject. These labs are also equipped with lots of facilities needed for industrial training.

reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied as there is no campus area, neither a canteen nor a playground.

review_content.Placements: On average, about 40% of students get placed as there are not many opportunities available in our state. The highest salary offered will be Rs.40000 per month, the lowest salary offered will be Rs.20000 per month and the average salary offered will be Rs.25000 per month. Shyplite is the industry where most of the faculty members of our college are also from there. About 30-40% of students with 90% above marks will get internships. One can become drug inspector, industrial worker, pharmacist at hospitals, teacher, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is below average. Wi-Fi is very slow and not available for students. Labs are in a good condition as well as the classrooms. The college has no campus as it is just a building. There are no hostels. Students have to rent rooms for themself. There is no canteen and playground. The medical facilities can be rated 2.5 stars out of 5 stars.

individual_reviews.title: Satisfied because of faculty and good infrastructure, but the college has only a 2% placement rate.

content.Placements: There is no placement available; they only call for local franchises and take 1-4 students out of 60, which is not good enough. Recruitment is done by Apollo Pharmacy, LIS Hospital. This year, 2025, they called PR Enterprises and they recruited 2 students and Signova Health Care Pvt recruited 4 students.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available for everyone. There is a shortage of classrooms; they often take classes in the seminar hall. The library is adequate. There is no hostel or canteen available in BPT, nor are there medical facilities. Sports and gaming facilities are also not available.

individual_reviews.title: This college is great.

content.Placements: 70-80% of students get placed in our college. The highest salary offered is 1 lakh per month and the lowest salary is Rs. 30,000 per month. The top recruiting companies like Cipla, Alkem, and other industries visit the college to hire students. Some students also get government jobs.
content.Infrastructure: It has good infrastructure but it does not have any hostels in it. There is good sanitation. It has neat and clean classrooms with smartboards for better education. It also provides medical facilities. It has good, and quality labs.

individual_reviews.title: College is ok. Faculty are also good. If you want to take admission in B.Pharm or D.Pharm, you can.

content.Placements: 60% of students got placed. The highest package is about 5 LPA, the lowest is 2 LPA, and the average is 3 LPA. content.Infrastructure: Everything is available in our college, but campus is very small compared to other colleges. Wi-Fi, labs, digital classrooms, library and also air conditioning are available. There is no hostel available in our capmus but sports and games are also played at various times.

individual_reviews.title: Nice college, good facilities with a lot of room for improvement, and it is still growing.

content.Placements: 30-40% were placed in my course. The highest, lowest, and average packages include 6 Lacs, 4 Lacs, and 5 Lacs respectively. Manufacturing and Quality Control units were mostly offered.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure need a lot of improvement, and there are no hostel facilities. The quality of the facilities is nice. individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied as there is no campus area, neither a canteen nor a playground.

content.Placements: On average, about 40% of students get placed as there are not many opportunities available in our state. The highest salary offered will be Rs.40000 per month, the lowest salary offered will be Rs.20000 per month and the average salary offered will be Rs.25000 per month. Shyplite is the industry where most of the faculty members of our college are also from there. About 30-40% of students with 90% above marks will get internships. One can become drug inspector, industrial worker, pharmacist at hospitals, teacher, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is below average. Wi-Fi is very slow and not available for students. Labs are in a good condition as well as the classrooms. reviews_list.review_title: The placement of my college is not good, but the teaching is very good.

As for sports and other games were not interested, and they were played only 2-3 times during the full year period.

overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?

review_summary.college_name: Government Polytechnic College, Nainital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best colleges in Uttarakhand.

content.Placements: Our college provided good placements. Many companies visited our college for recruitment. The highest salary package offered was 4 LPA by Hero Motors. The average salary package offered was 3.6 LPA by L&T. Top recruiting companies were Tata Motors, Bajaj Finance, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels were very good. Sports were conducted in this college. Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. Separate hostels were available for both boys and girls. Girls' hostel was around 300 meters away from our college, and the boys' hostel was 600 meters away from our campus. Playground was available. There was a decent library in this college. The parking facility was very good.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is a good government technical college in Uttarakhand.

content.Placements: More than 60% of students in our mechanical course got placed in companies like Tata, Honda, Nova etc. Above 60% of students in mechanical engineering got internships in Tata and Honda companies. The top roles are offered in shaping and designing the material.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities for our mechanical engineering course are good. Wi-Fi is good, and we use Wi-Fi all time. Labs are good and big and have lots of machines. The hostel quality is very low. The food is bad. There are no sports and games facilities.
